violations.text: Cheese was observed held at 50 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC voluntarily disposed of food. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2024

The large chest cooler was observed in poor repair (not holding adequate ambient temperature). PIC instructed to not store TCS foods in unit until service is provided. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2024
